title: Add trudoc and docs-ui packages with CI workflow

source.subject: feat(docs+ci): add trudoc/docs UI packages and workflow updates

body:
## Outcome

Add trudoc/docs UI packages and workflow updates.

## Context

- Workstream **ci-release** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **Platform-spec cutover** (`v02-platform-spec-cutover`).
- **trudoc** Zod/frontmatter verification guards platform-spec metadata in CI.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`8aa2813`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/8aa2813) — feat(docs+ci): add trudoc/docs UI packages and workflow updates
